docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,250.00 FILED BY MASON, SHERRY  M DENHAM, TONYA M. AS TO DEFENDANT BLANDING, JAMES L BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BLANDING, JAMES L BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DENHAM, TONYA M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLANDING, JAMES L BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS. $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $520.00, PLAINTIFF, MASON, SHERRY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO STANDING TO SUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BLANDING, JAMES L BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS.
